name: Fusion Draft
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>融</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>募</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Discard 1 card, then reveal 1 Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck; add 1 of the Fusion Materials whose names are mentioned on that revealed monster from your Deck or GY to your hand, except the discarded card, then you can add a second such card to your hand, if the first card added was a Normal Monster. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Fusion Draft" per turn.
eff: Discard 1 card, then reveal 1 Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck; add 1 of the Fusion Materials whose names are mentioned on that revealed monster from your Deck or GY to your hand, except the discarded card, then you can add a second such card to your hand, if the first card added was a Normal Monster. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Fusion Draft" per turn.

action: Reveals your Extra Deck for cost
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
